CreatePipe.description: Grants permission to create a pipe

DeletePipe.description: Grants permission to delete a pipe

DescribePipe.description: Grants permission to describe a pipe

ListPipes.description: Grants permission to list all pipes in your account

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list the tags for a resource

StartPipe.description: Grants permission to start a pipe

StopPipe.description: Grants permission to stop a pipe

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags from a resource

UpdatePipe.description: Grants permission to update a pipe

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by allowed set of values for each of the tags

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tag-value associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the presence of mandatory tags in the request
